title: Napoleonic Armory
description: A mod that includes cannons, over 15 blackpowder guns, and more.
body:
A blackpowder guns mod with 3D gun models and a variety between guns. If you wish to look at versions before v1.4.0, aka Curseforge, you can look [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blackpowder-guns).

--= HOW TO LOAD MOST GUNS =--

This mod utilizes the offhand heavily, far more than the average mod.
1. Equip your desired gun
2. Put gunpowder in the offhand and right click
3. Put a musket pellet in the offhand and right click
4. Put a ramrod in the offhand and right click
5. Fire via right click

Sometimes, however, the guns don't follow these rules. Others may use magazines, or others may use different tools.

If you need help determining damage, or a gun suited for what you need, look no further than the Napoleonic Guidebook. If you're having trouble finding a recipe, use a mod like JEI. If you still need help, join the Discord [here](https://discord.gg/U77y4tSTby) and feel free to leave after you've been helped.

**This mod was made in MCreator.**
